title: ConCus-T Leaf Window Film Privacy Static Cling Frosted Window Film Glass Door Film Decorative Resuable, Blue, 44.5 x 200 cm
features: Decorative Window Film: The window film with line outlined blue green leaves is UV-resistant, which filters strong dazzling sunlight glares and protects your skin or indoor furniture from harmful UV radiation
Privacy Window Film: 44.5 x 200 cm. The window privacy film can provide you with Privacy Protection during day and night , suitable for bedroom and bathroom
Sun Blocking Window Film: The modern window film in vinyl material is designed to block harsh sunlight while allow soft sunlight in, providing you comfortable resting and studying atmosphere

Static Cling Window Film: The frosted window film self adhesive can be easily applied to windows or doors with water, removed without residue and reusable for versatile decorating. Easy to clean for long-lasting indoor use
Widely Used Glass Film: The modern botanical window sticker can be cut into any shape and size you need according to your preferences or interests
description: Product Description ConCus-T Privacy Window Film Bright color window film provides comfortable atmosphere during day and night.
